title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Vestian - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Vestian - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Sales Manager looking for your next big career move? Vestian in Tiruchirappalli offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Vestian:
Vestian is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vestian!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
